calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff Discover Bank.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Ida Louise Lollis aka Ida L. Lollis aka Ida Lollis aka Ida Louise.
Declaration of Patrick Sayers pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Request to dimisss Does 1-10 granted. Counsel for plaintiff to file a dismissal.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Discover Bank against Defendant Ida Louise Lollis aka Ida L. Lollis aka Ida lollis aka Ida Louise.
as follows:

Principal $9,433.29
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $280.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $9713.29
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Set For Trial On Nov-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
